Barn conversion · Sleeps 8 + cots

Rose Cottage

Converted hay barn with two lounges & four-poster bedroom
🏠8Guests
🛌4Bedrooms
🛁2Bathrooms
🐕YesDogs

A large stone barn conversion sleeping eight across four bedrooms. On the ground floor a generous open-plan kitchen and a cosy lounge wrap around a stone fireplace with a wood-burner. A 10-seat farmhouse dining table makes it perfect for big family meals. Upstairs a spectacular first-floor sitting room with valley views leads to three further bedrooms, including one with a stunning wrought-iron four-poster king-size bed.

Best price guaranteed — book direct

The property in full

Every room, every detail

🔥Wood-burner
🏠Two lounges
🏻Four-poster bed

Living areas

  • Hall with cupboard, stairs to first floor
  • Open-plan lounge with stone fireplace & wood-burner
  • 10-seat farmhouse dining table
  • Fully equipped kitchen: fan-assisted oven, ceramic hob, microwave, fridge, dishwasher
  • UHD Smart TV & Blu-ray
  • Ground floor king-size bedroom (5ft)
  • Ground floor shower room with heated towel rail, WC & wash basin
  • Shared laundry: washing machine & tumble dryer

Bedrooms & bathrooms

  • First floor sitting room with valley views — Smart TV & Blu-ray
  • Bedroom 2 — twin single beds
  • Bedroom 3 — twin single beds
  • Bedroom 4 — four-poster king-size double (5ft)
  • Family bathroom: shower over bath, WC & wash basin

Good to know

  • Ample private parking
  • Walled orchard & private patio with picnic tables
  • EV charger on site · Laundry on site
  • Shop 2 miles · Pub 2 miles · Sea 2.5 miles
  • No smoking · Short breaks available out of season
  • Towels, duvets, cot & highchair included
  • Welcome basket: tea, coffee, milk, sugar, herbs, salt & pepper

Farm facilities included

  • Heated indoor pool — 30°C year-round, 8am–8pm daily
  • Games room — table tennis, pool, foosball, giant Connect Four, soft play
  • Bluebell woodland walk — magical in April & May
  • Playing field with playground, swings & slide
  • Feed the Animals with Ruth — Sundays & Wednesdays
  • Duckpool Beach (National Trust) — 2 miles
  • Bude town & sea pool — 6 miles
